name: defenseclaw-runtime-governance
description: Galileo Playground recipe for demonstrating DefenseClaw runtime governance, Agent Control decisions, and safety evals.

datasets.name: defenseclaw-safe-ops
datasets.demo_purpose: Shows normal read-only cluster operations passing cleanly.

datasets.name: defenseclaw-prompt-injection-pre-llm
datasets.demo_purpose: Shows pre-LLM prompt injection attempts that should be observed by Agent Control.

datasets.name: defenseclaw-dangerous-tool-pre-tool
datasets.demo_purpose: Shows dangerous shell/tool requests that should be denied before execution.

datasets.name: defenseclaw-pii-post-llm
datasets.demo_purpose: Shows post-LLM steering/redaction behavior for sensitive outputs.

datasets.name: defenseclaw-ambiguous-admin-intent
datasets.demo_purpose: Shows approval-seeking behavior for risky but plausible admin requests.

datasets.name: defenseclaw-grounded-cluster-review
datasets.demo_purpose: Shows grounded answers about the live isovalent-demo cluster and repo/cluster drift.

console_setup: Open the clus-demo project in Galileo SaaS.
Select one DefenseClaw dataset at a time from this manifest.
Use the dataset's default_metrics list as the Playground metric set.
Run the dataset, inspect row-level outputs, then log the experiment when the result is useful for the demo.
